essence: Works with local communities to provide support, reduce vulnerability, and connect people to services.

identity.title: Community Support Officer
identity.summary: Delivers outreach, welfare checks, and signposting to services; acts as a bridge between communities and statutory agencies.

salary.notes: Roles in specialist teams or with additional responsibilities may attract higher pay.

qualifications: Experience in community work, social care, or outreach
Ability to manage complex needs and multi‑agency referrals

lifestyle.description: Community‑facing role with varied hours, home visits, and partnership working to support vulnerable people.

habits: Makes referrals and signposts to services
